package rulecoverage

func NegativeGrpcContextNotPropagated() string {
    ruleID := "grpc_context_not_propagated"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "gRPC handler methods that create new `context.Background()` instead of using the stream/request context"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
